---
name: Task
about: Define a task with a deliverable, dependencies, and pass/fail criteria
title: "[TASK] "
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Deliverable

What concrete artifact should exist when this task is done?

## Dependencies

What must be complete first?

## Pass/Fail Criteria

How should a separate agent decide whether this task passed?

## Verification Prompt Notes

Any special instructions for the verifying agent.

## References

Relevant files, issues, or external constraints.
